docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY NGUYEN, RICHARD CATTAMANCHI, ADITHYA
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR JUN-06-2018 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2018 - JUDGMENT.
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
DEFENDANT'S SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL BRIEF FILED BY APPELLANT CATTAMANCHI, ADITHYA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-05-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-05-2018 BY PRO TEM ANDREA MCGARY. PLAINTIFF RICHARD NGUYEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ADITHYA CATTAMANCHI IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY CATTAMANCHI, ADITHYA NGUYEN, RICHARD
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUN-06-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-06-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ROGER R. RUBIN. (525)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED JAN-18-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CATTAMANCHI, ADITHYA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, RICHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CATTAMANCHI, ADITHYA $4,630.88 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,630.88, CAR SEAT REPLACEMENT ($350.00); BUMPER REPAIR ($1336.88) RENTAL CAR REIMBURSEMENT ($1444.40); TRANSMISSION INSPECTION ($1499.60) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, RICHARD ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-06-2018 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY NGUYEN, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT CATTAMANCHI, ADITHYA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2018 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, RICHARD ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT CATTAMANCHI, ADITHYA MAILED TO RESPONDENT NGUYEN, RICHARD
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUN-06-2018 - JUDGMENT ENTERED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT NGUYEN, RICHARD RECOVER FROM APPELLANT CATTAMANCHI, ADITHYA $2,781.28 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,781.28 PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CATTAMANCHI, ADITHYA
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-04-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
